description: This API is used to set the MW, P over Q, and load bus voltage thresholds for load models. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.6.0. ierr = set_load_model_thresh(lmwthresh, lpqthresh, lvtthresh) ierr, lmwthresh, lpqthresh, lvtthresh = set_load_model_thresh()
python_syntax: ierr = set_load_model_thresh(lmwthresh, lpqthresh, lvtthresh) ierr, lmwthresh, lpqthresh, lvtthresh = set_load_model_thresh()

parameters.name: lmwthresh
parameters.description: None. (input; MW threshold for applying load models: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default if ICODE is positive. This threshold can be used in load models to decide whether the load model should be applied or not.).

parameters.name: lpqthresh
parameters.description: None. (input; P by Q (absolute value) threshold for applying load models: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default if ICODE is positive. This threshold can be used in load models to decide whether the load model should be applied or not.).

parameters.name: lvtthresh
parameters.description: None. (input; pu load bus voltage threshold for applying load models: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default if ICODE is positive. This threshold can be used in load models to decide whether the load model should be applied or not.).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API not met.
